paper_focus.title: Bi-directional ferrite to austenite transformation through warm temperature deformation of a ferrite-based low density steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the mechanism and thermodynamic driving force for bi-directional deformation-induced ferrite-austenite transformation during warm temperature compression of a triplex ferrite-based low-density steel.
main_process_variables: hot rolling in 1100–1200 °C, 5 passes, air quenched
soaking at deformation temperature for 5 min
